activities.name: Evening Run
activities.description: Nice fall evening. Perfect weather for a run along Raritan.

activities.name: Evening Run
activities.description: Cut it short today. Not feeling it.

activities.name: Mueller State Park — Outlook Ridge Trail
activities.description: Last big hike of the season and what a way to close it out. Aspens still had some gold left, and we spotted a couple of Steller's jays near the summit. Tomas was a trooper.

activities.name: Friday Evening Run
activities.description: Feeling good again. Beautiful sunset along the trail.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Getting back into a rhythm. Cool evening.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Quick one before dinner.

activities.name: Morning Run - Overland Park
activities.description: Pool's closed for maintenance so I'm running mornings this week. Overland Park is nice and quiet at dawn.

activities.name: Ruby Hill Park Loop
activities.description: Ruby Hill loop. That hill never gets easier. 4 more days til the pool reopens.

activities.name: Morning run - Barnum Park
activities.description: Pool still closed. Two more days.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Pool is back!

activities.name: Saturday run - Wash Park
activities.description: Post-Thanksgiving calories.

activities.name: Saturday long - Cherry Creek
activities.description: Beautiful winter morning. Trail was quiet.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Last run before Christmas.

activities.name: Post-Christmas run
activities.description: Long one to work off Christmas dinner.

activities.name: Year-end evening run
activities.description: Last run of 2025.

activities.name: New Year run
activities.description: Starting 2026 strong.

activities.name: Sunday Run Club - Wash Park
activities.description: First run club outing! Met Carlos, Tanya, and Marcus. 45F and clear.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Squeezed one in between practice nights.

activities.name: Evening run
activities.description: Short one. Tournament brain.

activities.name: Morning jog
